/share/apps/gcc/11.2.0/bin/g++ -pg -g -pg "CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/gguf-hash.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/xxhash.dir/deps/xxhash/xxhash.c.o CMakeFiles/sha1.dir/deps/sha1/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/sha256.dir/deps/sha256/sha256.c.o -o ../../bin/llama-gguf-hash  -Wl,-rpath,/people/hoan163/project/llamaProfiling/llama.cpp/LlamaDebug/ggml/src: ../../ggml/src/libggml.so -lpthread /share/apps/cuda/12.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so
